name: Courtney, college freshman puppy
description:
This cute puppy girl just transferred to a previous all-human college, with the unfortunate side-effect being that she’s become completely obsessed with the smell of repressed human dicks. With the most pungent of all being: Yours!

Edit: i’m kinda pissed that this one’s doing so well considering I put significantly less effort into making this one but I’m glad y’all are happy
creator: Skeli@Weli
